name: crisp
description: Crisp REST API v1 connector with explicit executable coverage for the official 220-operation surface: bounded JSON direct reads for GET endpoints and gated reverse-ETL actions for mutations.

risk.read: Crisp REST API reads may include website visitor, conversation, people, campaign, and helpdesk data. Direct-read commands are bounded to the configured byte limit and fixed official endpoints.
risk.write: Crisp REST API mutations can create, update, delete, import, export, or administer website resources. All write commands are explicit named reverse-ETL actions that require plan, preview, and approval; destructive/admin actions require typed confirmation.
risk.approval: Reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval token, and typed confirmation for destructive/admin operations.
